title: 城市地标信息图
author: 大智智啊。
prompt: 制作一张[Xxx地标]的城市鸟瞰角度的信息图，结合地标的真实照片与白色技术注释和图解叠加。在图片左下角的手绘方框中写上建筑名称。叠加复杂白色技术标注，展示关键结构数据、重要测量、材料数量、细部做法，剖面图、平面图以及显著的建筑或工程特征。

title: Y2K风格夜拍时尚写真，粉凳少女复古潮拍
author: Miz
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "一位时尚的年轻女性，留着长长的赤褐色头发和刘海，夜晚坐在淡粉色的花园长凳上。她穿着一件带蕾丝饰边的淡彩色格子紧身胸衣式上衣和一条牛仔迷你裙。一只手臂随意地搭在长凳靠背上，另一只手靠近脸庞，摆出若有所思、自信的姿态。一个可爱的插画手袋放在她身旁的凳子上，一个小巧的复古数码配饰夹在她的裙子上。场景是一个舒适的花园露台，摆放着盆栽植物和柔和的绿植，采用直射机内闪光灯拍摄，营造出光泽感十足的 Y2K 时尚大片效果。构图亲密，夜晚氛围既俏皮又带点忧郁，超现实主义摄影。",
  "style": "写实摄影，Y2K 时尚大片",
  "lighting": "直射闪光灯摄影，高对比度，夜景",
  "camera": {
    "type": "35mm 胶片感",
    "lens": "35mm",
    "angle": "平视坐姿肖像"
  },
  "color_palette": "淡粉色，柔和的牛仔蓝，暖色调肤色",
  "mood": "怀旧，俏皮，梦幻，自信",
  "quality": "高细节，锐利对焦，胶片颗粒感，超高分辨率",
  "aspect_ratio": "3:4"
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "A fashionable young woman with long auburn hair and bangs sitting on a pastel pink garden bench at night. She wears a pastel plaid corset-style top with lace trim and a denim mini skirt. One arm drapes casually over the bench back, the other near her face, posing with a thoughtful, confident expression. A cute illustrated handbag rests beside her on the bench, and a small retro digital accessory clips to her skirt. The setting is a cozy garden patio with potted plants and soft greenery, shot with direct on-camera flash for a glossy Y2K editorial look. Intimate composition, playful yet moody nighttime atmosphere, ultra-realistic photography.",

title: 雪山豪车中的冬日时尚写真
author: Nano banana pro🍌
prompt:
一位女士坐在红色复古敞篷车中，置身于白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，呈现出超现实的冬季时尚肖像。

她的脸部必须与参考照片中的模特**完全一致**，保持相同的眼睛形状、眼神、眼睑结构、鼻子形状、嘴唇形状和丰满度、下颌线、颧骨、眉毛形状以及自然的皮肤纹理。

请勿改变、风格化、平滑或修饰脸部；**精确**保留参考照片中的所有真实比例和特征。

她坐在复古的 {"car color" "red"} 敞篷车的副驾驶座上，车停在白雪覆盖的阿尔卑斯山景中。

姿势：放松，略微向后靠，双手插在大衣口袋里。

表情：柔和、平静、安详、优雅。

服装：超大白色人造毛皮大衣，米色高领毛衣，米色长裤。

发型：长发，松散的波浪在冬日微风中轻轻飘动。

妆容：自然魅力妆——柔和的棕色眼影，淡眼线，自然睫毛，修饰过的眉毛，裸色唇。

光线：自然冬日阳光，皮肤上有温暖的高光，柔和的阴影，清冽的冷空气。

背景：白雪覆盖的山脉，松树林，蓝色天空，电影般的景深。

氛围：平静奢华，低调富裕，冬季时尚大片美学。

品质：超细节皮肤，锐利眼神，毛皮和针织品的真实纹理，高端时尚摄影，8K 质感。
prompt_en:
Ultra-realistic winter fashion portrait of a woman sitting in a red vintage convertible car in snowy alpine mountains.

Her face must look EXACTLY like the model in the reference photo keep the same eye shape, gaze, eyelid structure, nose shape, lip shape and volume, jawline, cheekbones, eyebrow shape and natural skin texture.

Do not alter, stylize, smooth, or retouch the face; preserve all real proportions and features exactly as in the reference.

She is sitting in the passenger seat of a vintage {"car color" "red"} convertible car, parked in a snowy alpine landscape.

Pose: relaxed, slightly leaning back, hands in pockets of the coat

Expression: soft, calm, serene, elegant.

Outfit: oversized white faux fur coat, cream turtleneck sweater, cream trousers.

Hair: long, loose waves blowing gently in the winter breeze.

Makeup: natural glam-soft brown eyeshadow, light liner, natural lashes, groomed eyebrows, nude lips

Lighting: natural winter sunlight, warm highlights on skin, soft shadows, crisp cold air.

Background: snow-covered mountains, pine forest, blue sky, cinematic depth of field.

Mood: calm luxury, quiet wealth, winter editorial aesthetic.

Quality: hyper-detailed skin, sharp eyes, realistic textures of fur and knitwear, premium editorial photography, 8K look.

title: 暗调人像光影艺术
author: Vivek Naskar
prompt: 这是一幅情绪氛围浓厚的肖像画：画面中的男子靠在混凝土墙上，身体大部分处于阴影之中。仅有一束细细的光线斜射过他的颧骨和下颌线。他穿着深色衬衫和牛仔裤，手表上有一处微弱的光泽。整幅画对比强烈，色调偏冷。
prompt_en: Moody portrait of a man leaning against a concrete wall with his body mostly in darkness. Only a thin diagonal beam of light cuts across his cheekbone and jawline. Dark shirt, dark jeans, subtle highlight on his watch. Heavy contrast, cold tones.

title: 超现实纸玻璃质感产品广告
author: aziz4ai
prompt:
这款[品牌产品]以一种超现实、极简主义的纸质玻璃风格进行展示。  
产品位于画面中央，由半透明的磨砂玻璃纸制成，背景为纯白色或淡淡着色的背景。  
柔和的电影级光照营造出朦胧的对比效果和朦胧的阴影。  
品牌的代表颜色通过光晕、雾气、液体或泡沫等元素与画面形成微妙的互动。  
产品附近配有简洁而优雅的四字标语。  
品牌标识以精致的方式呈现——可以是微微刻印的、发光的，或是印刷出来的。  
画面采用竖屏或正方形比例，细节极为丰富，宛如海报般的质感，视觉上令人舒缓，同时在概念上也显得十分精致。
prompt_en:
[Product by Brand] in a surreal, minimalist paper-glass style advertisement.
The product is centered, crafted from translucent frosted glass-paper, placed against a clean white or softly tinted background.
Soft cinematic lighting creates gentle contrast and ambient shadows.
A single brand color subtly interacts with the scene through glow, mist, liquid, or foam.
Include a bold, elegant 4-word slogan near the product.
The brand logo appears subtly etched, glowing, or printed in a refined manner.
Vertical or square aspect ratio, ultra-detailed, poster-quality, visually soothing and conceptually refined.

title: 粘土风奇幻史诗场景集

您是一位**世界级的文本到图像提示工程师**和**视觉叙事导演**。您的专长在于将抽象的文学或电影标题转化为极具视觉冲击力的图像。
prompt_en:
# Role Definition
You are a **World-Class Text-to-Image Prompt Engineer** and **Visual Narrative Director**. Your expertise lies in translating abstract literary or cinematic titles into highly

title: 品牌之爱话术
author: @aziz4ai
prompt: A romantic square-format bouquet inspired by [Brand Name]. Roses are crafted from visual patterns or textures that reflect the brand’s identity. The bouquet is wrapped in luxurious material echoing the brand’s signature style (e.g. silk, velvet, leather), and elegantly tied with one of the brand’s iconic products, replacing a traditional ribbon. Place it on a surface that matches the brand’s aesthetic. Add a message card beside the bouquet with a short, emotional 3-word slogan representing the brand’s spirit. Include the [Brand Name] logo subtly in the scene. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, elegant depth of field, premium editorial quality.
prompt_en: A romantic square-format bouquet inspired by [Brand Name]. Roses are crafted from visual patterns or textures that reflect the brand’s identity. title: 甜笑眨眼少女写真
author: @aytacaltintepe
prompt:
“超写实少女肖像，甜美友善表情，单眼眨眼，自然微笑。正常人脸比例，真实眼型大小，柔和青春面容，自然对称。

她微侧身体对镜头，上半身入镜，一手抬举随意比出胜利手势。姿态轻松俏皮。

深棕长发扎成高马尾，齐刘海覆额，浅色小号发圈，几缕碎发垂落脸侧。发丝质感真实，带自然光泽。

穿修身无袖吊带背心，细肩带，领口饰蕾丝边，下搭休闲热裤。衣物贴身却自然，布料张力与褶皱写实，无夸张。

身体比例真实自然，线条柔和，健康体态。肌肤平滑真实，微带高光与天然光泽，可见皮肤纹理，无塑胶或玩偶感。

背景干净明亮，无环境干扰，极简影棚风格。

光线柔和均匀，中性色调，曝光平衡，阴影温和，清晰度高。

摄影级真实，极致细节，自然写实，现代时尚片风格。
无动漫风，无卡通感，无大眼，无风格化，无奇幻元素。”
prompt_en:
Hyper-realistic portrait of a young woman with a cute and friendly expression, winking with one eye and smiling naturally. Normal human facial proportions, realistic eye size, soft youthful facial features, natural symmetry.

She is standing slightly angled toward the camera, upper body visible, one hand raised making a casual peace sign gesture. Relaxed and playful posture.

Dark brown hair styled in a ponytail with straight bangs covering the forehead, a small light-colored hair scrunchie, loose strands framing the face. Realistic hair texture with natural shine.

Wearing a fitted sleeveless tank top with thin straps and lace detail along the neckline, paired with casual short shorts. Clothes are snug and body-fitted but natural, realistic fabric tension and folds, no exaggeration.

Natural realistic body proportions, soft curves, healthy physique. Skin looks smooth and real with subtle highlights and slight natural sheen, visible skin texture, no plastic or doll-like appearance.

Clean light background with no environment distractions, studio-like minimal setup.

Soft even lighting, neutral tone, balanced exposure, gentle shadows, high clarity.

Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, natural realism, modern editorial photo style.
No anime style, no cartoon look, no oversized eyes, no stylization, no fantasy.

title: 高端鸡尾酒摄影：热带风情与精致摆盘的完美融合
author: Mo
prompt: 一张高端影棚照片，内容是 [{"cocktail name" "您的鸡尾酒"}]，从高角度略微俯视拍摄。饮品盛放在其传统的专属酒杯中，设计优雅，装饰专业。酒杯底部艺术性地散落着与鸡尾酒配方相关的新鲜水果和食材。场景营造出温暖、夏日的气氛，背景呈淡橙色调。热带棕榈叶的艺术柔和阴影投射在画面上，营造出度假的氛围。玻璃杯上有逼真的冷凝水，柔和的黄金时段光线，8k 分辨率，专业美食摄影，锐利对焦，干净精致的构图。
prompt_en: A high-end studio photograph of a [{"cocktail name" "YOUR COCKTAIL"}], shot from a high-angle slightly top-down perspective. The drink is served in its appropriate traditional glass with an elegant design and professional garnish. Artfully scattered around the base of the glass are fresh fruits and ingredients associated with the cocktail recipe. The scene features a warm, summery atmosphere with a light orange-tinted background. Artistic soft shadows of tropical palm leaves are cast across the frame, creating a vacation vibe. Realistic condensation on the glass, soft golden hour lighting, 8k resolution, professional food photography, sharp focus, clean and sophisticated composition.

title: 自由飞翔的瞬间，金色光影中的解放与欢愉
author: Artificial intelligence (Ai),Open Ai
prompt: [{"subject" "Subject"}]，挣脱束缚，自由飞翔，电影般的解放瞬间，秀发随风舞动，掠过欢笑的脸庞，双臂张开，拥抱疾风，衣衫被速度紧贴，细节纤毫毕现，双眼紧闭，沉浸于纯粹的感官体验，浅景深中世界飞速掠过，黄金时段的光线在运动中迸发，每一块肌肉都从紧张中释放，镜头光晕如破碎的锁链般散落，原始体验的细腻胶片颗粒感，喜悦的呐喊消散在风中，尊贵的冒险电影，牢笼开启后的第一次呼吸。
prompt_en: [{"subject" "Subject"}], unchained and flying, cinematic burst of liberation, hair whipping across laughing face, arms spread wide catching rushing wind, clothes pressed back by speed in hyper-real detail, eyes squeezed shut in pure sensation, shallow depth of field with world streaking past, golden hour light exploding through movement, every muscle released from tension, lens flares scattering like broken chains, fine film grain of raw experience, shout of joy lost to the wind, prestige adventure cinema, the first breath after the cage opens.

author: Aleena Amir
prompt: 一个大型建筑工地，微小的 {"workers" "工程师 / 建筑工人"} 正在一块一块地组装一个超大的 {"object" "日常物品"}。散落的组件，比例正确的工具，逼真的材料，富有戏剧性的工地照明。

title: 风中飘逸的诗意肖像
author: Saul Goodman

title: 黑白肖像配彩色涂鸦艺术
author: Alex Zhang

title: 电梯里的静谧花束：忧郁与温柔的时尚肖像
author: Maercih

title: 现代奢华时尚女性阳台写真生成提示词
author: Mila Noire

title: 银色礼服女性夜景时尚写真生成预设
author: Minhaa

title: 回忆那些模糊不清的瞬间……那个被“聚焦”下来的夜晚……
author: kingofdairyque
prompt:
请使用附件中照片的面部特征进行描述。照片中是一位年轻女性的特写镜头，显示在一款佳能紧凑型数码相机的屏幕上。相机机身上的按钮、旋钮以及带有纹理的表面都清晰可见，其中包括FUNC/SET旋钮、DISP按钮，以及屏幕侧面的“IMAGE STABILIZER”（图像稳定器）标识。照片中的女性身处室内，夜晚的环境中，她的身影被明亮的内置闪光灯照亮，这使得她的面部和头发呈现出清晰的高光效果。她的长发披散在脸上，表情柔和，嘴唇微微张开。在昏暗且杂乱的厨房背景下，闪光灯突出了她的面部特征；厨房里摆放着各种电器、架子，金属表面呈现出轻微的模糊效果。整个氛围显得自然、真实且充满怀旧感，让人联想到21世纪初使用数码相机拍摄的快照。照片的颜色偏暗淡，带有冷色调；闪光灯带来的对比度很强，同时屏幕显示效果也保留了自然的颗粒感。照片预览区域内没有文字或标志。

画面比例：4:5（纵向）

相机类型：紧凑型数码相机模拟
镜头焦距：相当于28–35毫米
光圈：f/2.8
ISO值：400
快门速度：使用闪光灯时为1/60秒
白平衡：自动闪光灯模式
光线条件：主体处使用强直射闪光灯，背景为微弱的环境光
色彩处理：采用具有怀旧风格的数码相机色调，高对比度的闪光灯效果，以及屏幕显示的自然颗粒感
prompt_en:
Use facial feature of attached photo. A close-up shot of a young woman displayed on the screen of a compact Canon digital camera. The camera body surrounds the image with its buttons, dials, and textured surface visible, including the FUNC/SET wheel, DISP button, and the “IMAGE STABILIZER” label along the side. The photo on the screen shows the woman indoors at night, illuminated by a bright built-in flash that creates sharp highlights on her face and hair. She has long dark hair falling across part of her face in loose strands, with a soft, slightly open-lip expression. The flash accentuates her features against a dim, cluttered kitchen background with appliances, shelves, and metallic surfaces softly blurred. The mood is candid, raw, nostalgic, and reminiscent of early 2000s digital camera snapshots. Colors are slightly muted with cool undertones, strong flash contrast, and natural grain from the display. No text, no logos inside the photo preview itself.

Scale ratio: 4:5 vertical

Camera: compact digital camera simulation
Lens: equivalent to 28–35mm
Aperture: f/2.8
ISO: 400
Shutter speed: 1/60 with flash
White balance: auto flash
Lighting: harsh direct flash on subject, ambient low light in the background
Color grading: nostalgic digital-camera tones, high contrast flash, subtle display grain, authentic screen glow

title: AI绘图模型诗歌提示人像生成测试
author: Emily
prompt: 她的身姿沐浴在令人窒息的正午阳光下，宛如一片无名的丝质天空。下方，海浪的节奏渐渐平缓下来；她身着宽松的牛仔装，显得随意而自由。一只乌鸦的羽毛轻轻落在她裸露的肩上，其阴影与蔚蓝的天空形成鲜明对比。她的面容如瓷器般光滑细腻，仿佛在房间的宁静中散发着光芒。她那双深邃的榛色眼睛隐藏着大地与夏日天空的秘密。柔和的光线在她身后弥漫开来，将墙壁渲染成朦胧的背景。这幅画面宛如一幅生动的肖像画——她既是清晨的使者，也是太阳的化身。
prompt_en:
Another test with the poem prompt technique,  this time, Nano banana Pro, Grok Imagine 0.9, Midjourney V7 and FLUX 2 Pro.
She wears the breathless noon upon her frame,A silken slice of sky without a name.Below, the faded rhythm of the sea,
In woven denim, casual and free.
A raven cascade falls on shoulders bare,
A shadow contrast to the azure air.
Her face, a porcelain and polished moon,
That glows within the quiet of the room.
The hazel deepness of her open eyes,
Holds secrets of the earth and summer skies.Behind, the soft diffusion of the light,Turns sanctuary walls to bokeh bright.A living portrait, poised and softly spun,A daughter of the morning and the sun.85mm Portrait Lens, f/1.8 Aperture, Ulzzang Aesthetic, Soft K-Beauty Lighting, Pastel Color Grading, High Fidelity Texture, Rule of Thirds Composition.

title: 星空水彩肖像生成：保留人脸细节，融合星云纹理
author: Gagan Singh
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "使用上传的参考图片，**100% 保留人物的面部特征、身份、年龄、肤色和表情**。不要改变面部结构或比例。创作一幅**宇宙星系水彩肖像**，其中脸部保持柔和逼真，但与星云纹理柔和融合。头发遵循精确的参考风格，发丝中编织着微妙的星尘高光。服装：简单的深色或中性服装，融入旋转的星系图案。背景：深邃的太空，充满活力的星云、闪烁的星星、漂浮的光粒子，以及靛蓝、青色、紫罗兰和宇宙蓝色调的水彩星系。柔和的空灵轮廓光勾勒出剪影。精细的铅笔素描线条与水彩晕染、平滑的渐变、梦幻般的景深、电影般的艺术杰作品质。",
  "negative_prompt": "模糊、低质量、变形、多余肢体、糟糕的解剖结构、水印、文字叠加、动漫、卡通、过曝、欠曝、丑陋的脸、糟糕的手、脸部改变、身份改变、刺眼的灯光、塑料皮肤、扁平的颜色",
  "parameters": {
    "steps": 50,
    "cfg_scale": 7.2,
    "sampler": "Euler a or DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "strength": 0.53,
    "noise": 0.28,
    "width": 832,
    "height": 1216,
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
  },
  "usage_instructions": "在 img2img 或参考模式下上传您的图片。将强度保持在 0.5–0.55 左右，以使面部**100% 匹配**，同时将肖像融入宇宙水彩世界。"
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded reference image to **preserve 100% of the facial features, identity, age, skin tone, and expression** of the person. Do not alter facial structure or proportions. Create a **cosmic galaxy watercolor portrait** where the face remains soft and realistic but is gently merged with nebula textures. Hair follows the exact reference style, with subtle stardust highlights woven through the strands. Clothing: simple dark or neutral attire that fades into swirling galaxy patterns. Background: deep space filled with vibrant nebulas, glowing stars, floating light particles, and watercolor galaxies in shades of indigo, teal, violet, and cosmic blue. Soft ethereal rim light outlines the silhouette. Fine pencil sketch lines mixed with watercolor bleeds, smooth gradients, dreamy depth, cinematic and artistic masterpiece quality.",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text overlay, anime, cartoon, overexposed, underexposed, ugly face, bad hands, face altered, identity changed, harsh lighting, plastic skin, flat colors",
  "parameters": {
    "steps": 50,
    "cfg_scale": 7.2,
    "sampler": "Euler a or DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "strength": 0.53,
    "noise": 0.28,
    "width": 832,
    "height": 1216,
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
  },
  "usage_instructions": "Upload your image in img2img or reference mode. Keep strength around 0.5–0.55 to keep the face **100% matching**, while blending the portrait into a cosmic watercolor universe."
}

title: 产品添加炫酷光效2
author: 雏田小姐
prompt: 红色区域是喷射蓝色光流(模拟气流)，光流带粒子特效，适当的透明度。光线路径参考产品的动态曲线，仿佛能量在产品内部高速运转，营造专业且富有未来感的视觉效果，深蓝色为主调的色彩搭配，不要出现红色。

title: 超写实街拍风格女性模特穿搭不对称羊毛斗篷造型
author: Amanpreet Singh
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "一张超逼真的全身街拍照片，模特是一位 20 多岁末的自然女性，身穿一件 {\"garment color\" \"炭灰色\"} 不对称羊毛披风，与参考图完全相同，肩部有优雅的垂坠褶皱。模特与之前的所有参考图都不同——她留着齐肩波浪形栗棕色头发，暖米色肤色，神情轻松自信。她在柔和的日光下户外拍摄，随意地站在欧洲街道上，背景是石墙或大理石墙，营造出一种现代而自然的氛围。服装包括深色直筒牛仔裤、及踝靴和一只小皮质斜挎包。光线是柔和的自然日光（约 5200 K），均匀漫射，以突出羊毛的质感和微妙的阴影。皮肤应真实可见纹理，眼睛清澈，比例符合人体。使用单反 50 毫米镜头拍摄，f/4，ISO 200，以获得真实的景深。结果必须与真实照片无异——真实的织物细节、栩栩如生的模特表情、平衡的曝光和摄影写实主义。",
  "negative_prompt": "无风格化 AI 面孔，无过度平滑的皮肤，无对称伪影，无 HDR 光晕，无塑料感，无奇幻背景，无运动模糊，无重复肢体，无扁平光线，无裁剪画面，无恐怖谷美学。",
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "number_of_images": 1,
  "style": "超现实生活时尚",
  "quality": "超高",
  "safety_filter_level": "严格",
  "image_config": {
    "output_format": "png",
    "color_space": "sRGB",
    "resolution": "4k"
  }
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "Ultra photo-realistic full-body street-style photograph of a natural female model in her late 20s wearing a {"garment color" "charcoal gray"} asymmetric wool poncho identical to the reference, with elegant draped folds on one shoulder. The model is different from all previous references — she has shoulder-length wavy chestnut-brown hair, warm beige skin tone, and a relaxed, confident look. She is photographed outdoors in soft daylight, standing casually on a European street with a stone or marble wall background, giving a modern yet natural vibe. The outfit includes straight dark jeans, ankle boots, and a small leather crossbody bag. Lighting is soft natural daylight (around 5200 K), evenly diffused to highlight the wool texture and subtle shadows. Skin should look realistic with visible texture, eyes clear, and proportions humanly accurate. Captured with a DSLR 50 mm lens, f/4, ISO 200 for authentic focus depth. The result must look indistinguishable from a real photo — true fabric details, lifelike model expression, balanced exposure, and photographic realism.",
  "negative_prompt": "no stylized AI faces, no over-smooth skin, no symmetry artifacts, no HDR glow, no plastic look, no fantasy background, no motion blur, no duplicated limbs, no flat lighting, no cropped frame, no uncanny valley aesthetics.",
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "number_of_images": 1,
  "style": "hyper-realistic lifestyle fashion",
  "quality": "ultra",
  "safety_filter_level": "strict",
  "image_config": {
    "output_format": "png",
    "color_space": "sRGB",
    "resolution": "4k"
  }
}

title: 精准复刻户外人像写真生成
author: Taaruk

title: 熊探洞穴插画设计
author: JI1BXM
prompt: 创作一幅插画：一只熊（这只熊是我账户图标中预先上传的那只）正探头往一个深洞里看。
prompt_en: 熊さん（熊さんは私のアカウント用アイコンのものを予めアップしてある）が深い穴を覗き込んでいるイラストを作ってくれ

title: 极简地标微景模型
author: @aleenaamiir
prompt:
一个干净、极简的3D等距立体透视模型，展示了来自[国家名称]的精选标志性地标集合，被安排成一个连贯的微型建筑群。每个地标都经过精心简化与风格化，同时保持瞬间可识别性，并通过一致的尺度、几何形状与克制的材质调色板实现统一。

这些地标坐落在一个平滑混凝土基座上，边缘柔和圆润，唤起高端建筑模型的审美。真实材质、微妙表面瑕疵与柔和工作室灯光增强深度与真实感。整体构图平衡且不杂乱，呈现在中性背景前。

在构图顶部中央，干净极简的字体展示标题“[国家名称]”，无缝融入场景且不过度抢眼。

超高细节、现代等距透视、微型建筑模型风格。
prompt_en:
A clean, minimal 3D isometric diorama depicting a curated collection of iconic landmarks from [COUNTRY NAME], arranged as a cohesive miniature architectural set. Each landmark is thoughtfully simplified and stylized while remaining instantly recognizable, unified through consistent scale, geometry, and a restrained material palette.

The landmarks sit on a smooth concrete base with softly rounded edges, evoking a premium architectural model aesthetic. Realistic materials, subtle surface imperfections, and soft studio lighting enhance depth and realism. The overall composition is balanced and uncluttered, presented against a neutral background.

At the top center of the composition, clean minimalist typography displays the title “[COUNTRY NAME]”, seamlessly integrated into the scene without overpowering the diorama.

Ultra-high detail, modern isometric perspective, miniature architectural model style.

title: 超现实时尚摄影：持枪女与棕熊的奢华对峙
author: Sharon Riley

title: 泛黄旧报纸手账
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt:
泛黄旧报纸手账
复古怀旧风格的9:16时尚插画。背景模仿陈旧的泛黄信纸，边缘有烧焦效果的手绘纹理和咖啡渍印记。中央是用户复古穿搭的贴纸，处理成胶片颗粒感，但保留白色贴纸边框。Labubu公仔贴纸戴着复古墨镜和花衬衫，坐在旁边。衣物解构部分展示了复古皮夹克和牛津鞋的贴纸。隐藏层贴纸是一件复古丝绸吊带裙，质感丝滑。周围用钢笔墨水风格绘制了优雅的草写英文日期和复古相框涂鸦。贴纸边缘用半透明的纸胶带图案固定。画面平整，无任何书写工具或手部入镜，纯粹的复古平面设计。

title: 游戏风美少女居家镜子自拍写真
author: @NameIsSudee

title: 灯泡头人像：白鸽栖息创意象征
author: 𝐌
prompt: 一幅超现实的极简主义概念艺术作品：一个巨大的透明玻璃球形白色灯泡，底部散发出柔和的金色光芒，形成一种温和的灯丝状照明。一只小巧精致的纯白色小鸟（{argument name="bird type" default="white dove or small white sparrow"}），羽毛细节清晰可见，平静地栖息在灯泡内部灯丝顶部最亮的内发光环上。灯泡与一个优雅的无面白色人体模型或抽象女性形象的上半身无缝融合/连接，该形象身着光滑的极简主义白色西装外套，配有高领/立领。该形象仅展示从颈部到腰部的侧面视图，站立笔直，姿态优雅。整个雕塑般的形象呈纯白色/象牙色/米白色，具有柔软的磨砂陶瓷或石膏质感。背景为非常柔和的中性灰色工作室，光影微妙，呈现高端超现实摄影风格，电影般的光照，梦幻般的宁静氛围，概念艺术，细节极其丰富，8k 分辨率。
prompt_en: A surreal minimalist conceptual artwork, a white light bulb with a large transparent glass sphere, glowing softly from inside with warm golden light at the bottom forming a gentle filament-like illumination. A small, delicate pure white bird ({argument name="bird type" default="white dove or small white sparrow"}) with subtle feather details perches calmly on the brightest inner glowing ring at the top of the filament inside the bulb. The light bulb is fused/merged seamlessly onto the upper torso of an elegant faceless white mannequin or abstract female figure dressed in a smooth minimalist white suit jacket with a high rolled white collar/stand collar. The figure is shown only from neck to waist in profile view, standing upright, clean elegant posture. The entire sculpture-like figure is pure white/ivory/off-white with soft matte ceramic or plaster texture. Very soft neutral gray studio background, subtle shadows, high-end surreal photography style, cinematic lighting, dreamlike peaceful atmosphere, conceptual art, extremely high detail, 8k resolution

title: 名人合影替换工具
author: мᴀκᴇ AI on 𝕏 ԍʀᴇᴀт 🤖💻📱👀
prompt: 从照片中移除女性，然后放入 {"celebrity_1" "Lady Gaga"} 和 {"celebrity_2" "Scarlett Johansson"}。
prompt_en: Quita a las mujeres de las fotos y pon a {"celebridad_1" "Lady Gaga"}, y a {"celebridad_2" "Scarlett Johansson"}

author: KeorUnreal
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 在古罗马温泉浴场中的超写实时尚编辑照片，浅水区，展现出掌控一切的霸气姿态，冷峻不可触及的表情，金色深 V 湿身紧身连衣裙，左腿有蛇形纹身，85mm 镜头，浅景深，3:4",
  "style": "超高端超写实时尚摄影，电影级编辑写实主义，自然光学，物理正确的光照，零风格化，纯摄影",
  "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
  "resolution": "8k",
  "lighting": "明亮受控的柔和日光，自然高光，柔和阴影，微妙的水面反射，清晰曝光",
  "camera_angle": "略低于胸部水平，中近景到中全身，85mm 镜头，浅景深",
  "subject": {
    "name": "{\"subject name\" \"Ana de Armas\"}",
    "face": "冷峻、霸气、对称的五官，瓷器般肌肤带有一丝温暖",
    "expression": "捕食者般的平静，直接锁定的目光，不带笑容，嘴唇放松闭合，不可触及的权威感",
    "makeup": "极简雕塑感，强调眼部和骨骼结构",
    "hair": "长直发，发根深色渐变至发梢浅色，略微湿润，发际线清晰",
    "physique": "优雅而有力量的女性身姿，自信挺拔的姿态",
    "skin": "白皙透亮，下半身有逼真的湿润光泽，左腿有细致的完整蛇形纹身",
    "outfit": "薄款金色深 V 垂坠式泳裙混合体，下半身湿透紧贴，深 V 领口",
    "jewelry": "钻石耳坠，多层细金项链，金色臂环",
    "pose": "手肘撑在浅水中，一条腿弯曲，一条腿向前伸展，躯干略微后倾，臀部着地，掌控空间"
  },
  "environment": {
    "location": "古罗马温泉浴场，淡色石质古典柱子和建筑",
    "atmosphere": "明亮柔和的漫射日光，宏伟但次于主体",

  },
  "image_quality": {
    "detail_level": "超写实肌肤微细节，自然湿润光泽，细致纹身",
    "overall_vibe": "侵略性的优雅，平静而危险的优越感，纯粹的权威和性自信"
  }
}
```

title: 文字生成精美的杂志文章的照片
author: @fofrAI
prompt: 请将这段文字原封不动地复制到一张精美杂志文章的照片中，照片需包含图片、漂亮的排版设计、精选语录和大胆的格式。原文如下：[……未格式化的文章]
prompt_en: Put this whole text, verbatim, into a photo of a glossy magazine article on a desk, with photos, beautiful typography design, pull quotes and brave formatting. The text: [...the unformatted article]

title: Watermelon swimming pool micro-world
author: 歸藏(guizang.ai)
prompt: A cross-sectional view of a giant watermelon. The red flesh is actually a swimming pool filled with red water. The black watermelon seeds are swim rings. Miniature people are swimming and sunbathing on the watermelon rind. Summer vibe.
prompt_en: A cross-sectional view of a giant watermelon. The red flesh is actually a swimming pool filled with red water. The black watermelon seeds are swim rings. Miniature people are swimming and sunbathing on the watermelon rind. Summer vibe.

title: 超逼真的野生动物摄影场景
author: NanoBanana_labs
prompt: 超逼真的野生动物摄影场景（使用上传照片中的参考人脸）。一位身着专业野生动物狩猎服的男子——浅棕色户外衬衫、结实耐用的工装裤和厚实的野外靴。他平躺在草地上，手持一台配备长焦镜头的专业单反相机，正专注于拍摄野生动物。他的肩上趴着一只活泼的小狮子，正眺望着远方。拍摄于黄金时段的自然光线下，以非洲稀树草原为背景，拥有电影级的景深，8K超高清细节，色彩鲜艳。力求100%还原我的面部特征。高清单反拍摄。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic wildlife photography scene, (use reference face from uploaded photo). A man wearing proper wildlife-safari clothing — light brown outdoor shirt, rugged cargo pants, and sturdy field boots. He is lying flat on the grassy ground, holding a professional DSLR camera with a large telephoto lens, focusing on wildlife. On his shoulder sits a playful lion cub looking into the distance. Golden hour natural light, African savannah background, cinematic depth of field, 8K detail, vibrant colors. Keep my face 100% accurate. HD quality DSLR.

author: 松果先森
prompt: 来一场十二生肖之间的“战斗”吧，采用JOJO的画风，一定要有JOJO的风格！用中文来描述这...

来个十二生肖互相打架，JOJO画风，...

title: 微缩圣诞场景模型制作
author: Alexandra Aisling
prompt: 一个舒适的微缩立体模型，展示着 {argument name="activity" default="[ACTIVITY]"}，其中有表情微妙的微型手工人物，按 1:87 比例精心制作的道具，温暖的黄金时段光线投下柔和的阴影，光束中可见的尘埃，营造出一种温馨的生活片段氛围。采用移轴摄影效果，景深较浅，充满怀旧和亲密感。
prompt_en: A cozy miniature diorama of {argument name="activity" default="[ACTIVITY]"}, tiny handcrafted figures with subtle expressions, meticulously detailed props at 1:87 scale, warm golden-hour lighting casting soft shadows, dust motes visible in light beams, a gentle slice-of-life atmosphere. Tilt-shift photography effect, shallow depth of field, nostalgic and intimate.
